Shoot with a cinematic special effect Dolly Zoom, previously not available without special equipment.
Find something (or someone!), press the capture button and move smoothly towards the object or away from the object so that the object does not change its size.
The Dolly Zoom Effect is achieved by zooming a zoom lens to adjust the angle of view while the camera dollies (moves) toward or away from the subject in such a way as to keep the subject the same size in the frame throughout. It sounds complicated, but our application takes all the work for itself. This effect is also known as the Hitchcock effect, which first applied it when shooting his film “Vertigo”.
   FEATURES
• Select an effect mode - zoom in or zoom out. Try both options.

Warning. To activate paid filters, click on the "Unlock" button then click on purchase. At the moment when it asks you to sign in with Apple ID, click on "Cancel" button. After these actions you will get access to paid content.

    Phonto is a simple app that allows you to add text to pictures.

・ More than 400 fonts are available.

・ Background image is changeable.

・ You can use not only pictures, but also plain images to write text.

・ You can share photos on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram.

・ URL scheme: phonto://

    LANGUAGE

Phonto supports only English (US), Chinese and Japanese, so when the priority of Chinese (or Japanese) in your setting was higher than English, Phonto would be launched as Chinese (or Japanese) mode.

To solve this problem…

1. Open the Settings app.

2. Choose 'English' in 'General' > 'Language & Region' > 'iPhone Language'.

3. Turn back your 'iPhone Language' to your favorite language.

    HOW TO INSTALL FONTS

Using iTunes, you can copy font files between your computer and Phonto on your iOS device.

1. Select your iOS device from the Devices section of iTunes.

2. Click the Apps tab and scroll down to the bottom of the page.

3. Select "Phonto" in the "File Sharing" section.

4. Drag and drop .ttf or .otf font files into "Documents".

5. Restart Phonto.

Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

SMARTER, SIMPLER MEAL TRACKING
Track your meals your way:
• Snap a photo to get instant nutrition details.

• Calorie counter

• Nutrition plans for weight management and body composition
• Water tracker
• Fruit, vegetable, and fish tracker
• Meal plans with grocery lists included

apps.name: Clarity: Mental Health Journal
apps.localizedDescription:
Clarity is your all-in-one mental health hub for managing stress, anxiety, and low mood. Learn what affects your mood, develop healthier thought patterns, problem solve with the AI chatbot, practice effective coping skills, build resilience, and foster personal growth.

HOW IT WORKS
Clarity is built on proven methods widely studied and endorsed in the world of mental health. The core principle is simple yet powerful: by understanding and changing your thoughts, you can better manage your emotions and actions.
Clarity integrates approaches from behavioral science, positive psychology, and mindfulness to bring you the best self-care tools offered by modern science.

REFRAME YOUR THOUGHTS
- Use proven techniques to break free from negative thought cycles.
- Identify and confront Cognitive Distortions hindering your mental well-being.
- Challenge and transform your thought processes for the better.

AI-INFUSED JOURNALING & CHAT
- Step into the future of mental health with innovative AI features.
- Journal with AI-driven questions and analysis that adapt to your mental state.
- Feel heard with a thoughtful and compassionate AI Chatbot built for self-reflection.

apps.name: Bearable - Symptom Tracker
apps.localizedDescription:
Feeling overwhelmed by your health? Bearable can help you feel more in control of your symptoms, flare-ups, and overall well-being.
Join over 900,000 people securely managing their Chronic Illnesses, Migraine, Pain, Headaches, Fatigue, IBS, PoTS, PCOS, EDS, Period, Mood, Mental Health and more - with Bearable.

Bearable helps you discover and manage triggers for changes in your health. Our simple, customizable tracking tools make it easy to understand the correlation between anything you do and the impact it has on your symptoms.
By learning what affects your Pain, Headaches, Migraines, Periods, IBS, PCOS, and Mood Disorders, you can take back control of your health, share better information with doctors, and manage triggers, treatments, and medications.

FOR PEOPLE WHO WANT TO TRACK:
- What makes their health better or worse
- New or unexplained symptoms & flare-ups
- Existing or suspected chronic illnesses
- The impact of medication & treatments
- The effect of habits & activities on health
- Patterns in symptom severity, pain levels, and mood
